# Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)

This folder contains automatically generated Architecture Decision Records for SahiDawa.

ADRs are created when a merged PR has an **Impact Score ≥ 15**, indicating a significant architectural change.

## ADR Index

| ADR | PR | Date | Title |
|---|---|---|---|

*Generated by the [SahiDawa DevTrack System](../README.md)*
